authenticity.notes: Authenticity check passed: article has enough specificity, business relevance, source alignment, and trend support.

notes: The article provides a clear, practical guide to implementing Planning AI with memory in business workflows, specifically focusing on a customer support use case.
Content is well-structured with key takeaways, direct answer, expert insights, and step-by-step implementation guidance.
Uses authoritative sources from logisticsviewpoints.com and tryenvoy.ai to support claims about AI memory systems.
Addresses search intent effectively with practical implementation guidance for business owners evaluating AI automation.
Includes measurable business outcomes (85% lead reduction, 2-hour response time, 10 hours saved weekly) which adds credibility.
Content aligns well with target keyword 'planning ai needs memory, not just automation - logistics viewpoints'.
Provides specific tools (Make.com, n8n, Zapier, CRM) and a clear implementation checklist.
